verdicts.diagnostic: pre-repair scaffold bug: fixture_with_iterations interpolated a raw literal (e.g. "\"five\"") into a YAML double-quoted title, producing `title: "... = "five""` which broke YAML parsing before the loader could exercise the typed type-mismatch path; repair removes the interpolation so the string-iterations subtest reaches the BuildConfigTypeMismatch check and passes against the landed impl

pre-repair scaffold bug: duplicate-constant scan walked crates/*/tests/ and matched the YAML-literal `max_inner_loop_iterations: 5` inside story 6's loader fixtures; repair tightens the scope to crates/agentic-story/src/ per story 17 Decision 2 (defaults-locus is a src-only concern), after which the single-hit assertion passes against the landed impl
